page.title: Japan Airlines 1402 Flight Attendant Skirt Voyeurism Incident

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:日本航空1402便客室乗務員スカート内盗撮事件]]


'''Japan Airlines Flight 1402 Cabin Crew Skirt Infiltration Incident''' (日本航空1402便客室乗務員スカート内盗撮事件) refers to a 2012 voyeurism incident aboard a Japan Airlines passenger aircraft, in which a male passenger secretly filmed beneath a flight attendant’s skirt.  He was arrested but released without prosecution due to insufficient evidence.

== Overview ==
On the morning of September 10, 2012, aboard {{ill|Japan Airlines Flight 1402|de|Japan-Airlines-Flug 1402|ja|日本航空1402便|zh|日本航空1402航班|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japan Airlines Flight 1402|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from {{ill|Takamatsu Airport|en|Takamatsu Airport|qid=Q1334603|lt=Takamatsu Airport|1=Takamatsu Airport}} to {{ill|Haneda Airport|de|Flughafen Haneda|ja|羽田空港|zh|羽田机场|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haneda Airport|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東京国際空港|1=Haneda Airport|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q204853}}, a 34-year-old man used a pen-shaped camera to secretly film beneath the skirt of a 27-year-old {{ill|Flight attendant|en|Flight attendant|qid=Q101539|lt=Flight attendant|1=Flight attendant}}.  He was arrested that same day under the {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|de|Belästigungsverordnung der Präfektur Hyōgo|ja|兵庫県迷惑防止条例|zh|兵库县防骚扰条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōgo Prefecture Nuisance Prevention Ordinance|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (voyeurism) by local police.<ref name="nikkei">{{Cite news|title=飛行中で場所特定できず　機内で盗撮容疑の男釈放 |publisher=[[日本経済新聞]] |date=2012-10-12}}</ref>

At the time, voyeurism was regulated by prefectural ordinances rather than national law, and each ordinance applied only within its own prefectural airspace.  Determining which prefecture’s ordinance covered an in-flight act was therefore difficult.<ref>{{Cite news |title=客室乗務員の盗撮容疑で初逮捕　飛行中の旅客機内 |publisher=[[共同通信社]] |date=2012-09-12}}</ref>  In this case, investigators used the time the seatbelt sign went off and passenger testimony to fix the act at 8:09 a.m., and matched that to flight-path data showing the plane over Sasayama City (now [[:en:Tanba-Sasayama|Tanba Sasayama]]) in Hyōgo Prefecture, enabling the first-ever in-flight voyeurism arrest in Japan.<ref name="mainichi">{{Cite news |title=「盗撮に気づいたらすぐに時計を見て」　深刻化する航空機内での盗撮被害を受けて警視庁が呼びかけ |publisher=[[毎日新聞]] |date=2012-10-27}}</ref>

The suspect confessed, saying, “I like uniforms and just ended up filming,” and police found a large cache of similar images on his home computer.<ref>{{Cite news |title=機内盗撮容疑の男を釈放＝上空の犯行場所特定できず－警視庁 |publisher=[[時事通信社]] |date=2012-10-12}}</ref>  However, Sasayama lies at Hyōgo’s eastern edge, and at typical flight speeds the aircraft would have left Hyōgo airspace within about one minute; no passenger could corroborate the exact time by looking at a watch.  The [[:en:Prosecution|prosecution]] ruled the evidence insufficient to prove the act took place over Hyōgo, and in October 2012 released him without indictment.<ref name="nikkei"/><ref name="mainichi"/>

In 2023, the national {{ill|Act on Punishment of Acts Relating to the Sexual Capture of Images, etc.|de|Gesetz zur Bestrafung sexualisierter Bildaufnahmen|ja|性的な姿態を撮影する行為等の処罰及び押収物に記録された性的な姿態の影像に係る電磁的記録の消去等に関する法律|zh|捕捉性形态影像行为等惩处法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Act on Punishment of Acts Relating to the Sexual Capture of Images, etc.|1=Sexual Dignity Filming Crime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q120759222}} (Voyeurism Act) was enacted and came into force.  Under this law, sexual voyeurism onboard any Japanese-registered aircraft is now punishable under national criminal law, regardless of prefecture.<ref>[https://trafficnews.jp/post/126922 旅客機「CAなどへの性的盗撮」なぜ処罰難しかった？ 今日から「撮影罪」施行、どう変わる] 乗りものニュース編集部、2023年7月13日（2023年9月15日閲覧）。</ref>

== Footnotes ==

* {{ill|Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths|de|Organisierter Voyeurismus-Vorfall in Freiluftbädern|ja|露天風呂での組織的盗撮事件|1=Organized Voyeurism Scandal at Outdoor hot spring baths|zh|露天浴中的组织偷窥事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Organized Voyeurism Incident at Open-Air Baths|13=User:Immanuelle/Organized Voyeurism Scandal at Outdoor hot spring baths|qq=}}
* {{ill|Ishi ni yoru Kenkōshindan Tōsatsu Jiken|de|Arztspionagefall bei Gesundheitsuntersuchung|ja|医師による健康診断盗撮事件|1=Doctor Voyeurism|zh|医生健康检查偷拍事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishi ni yoru Kenkōshindan Tōsatsu Jiken|13=User:Immanuelle/Doctor Voyeurism|qq=}}
